name: foodjourney
description: A unique culinary adventure food tracking app with gamification, AI recognition, and social features

scripts.test: concurrently "cd web && npm test" "cd backend && npm test"
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd web && npm run lint" "cd backend && npm run lint" "cd mobile && npm run lint"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd web && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
